title: Plants vs. Zombies™ 3: Evolved
notes:
WHAT’S NEW

Faster Progression: Fewer levels, less filler, more gameplay! Fewer + less = more!
Stronger Plants: Higher-tier plants hit harder with simpler leveling (max level 10)!
More Merging: Merging is the key to success in lane battle, and in life!
Harder Zombies: Bigger zombie waves coming to visit your house!
Smarter Counters: Wall-nuts block Bowling Zombies! Smart, right?
Plant Portraits: Level up plants to unlock pictures of plants!
Better Balance: Star score reflects your performance!
